Everyone knows that saving more and eating healthy is beneficial in the long term. But why do we fail to follow it?
In this presentation, Vibhu and I discuss how temptations, envy, and procrastination prevent us from reaching our goals. We talk about techniques to minimize these obstacles and reach our goals.
You can download the presentation slides from [here](https://public-api.wordpress.com/bar/?stat=groovemails-events&bin=wpcom_email_click&redirect_to=https%3A%2F%2Fjanav.files.wordpress.com%2F2021%2F06%2Fwhats-getting-in-your-way_.pdf&sr=1&signature=8cd65609d6671cf40fbfd0bff0efa7ff&user=8c75b1c84af96d984bdb9fbc54a41aa1&_&_z=z).
I edited out 2 mins from the presentation to avoid potential copyright violation. You can watch that 2 mins [here](https://vimeo.com/40184879).
